zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Phillip de Compton III於大約1258年出生在英國戴文康普頓時，他的父親Osbert Thomas de Compton59歲，母親Margaret Strathearn52歲。他於大約1275年與Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus在英國戴文康普頓 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1279年在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克享年23歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Phillip de Compton III于大约1258年出生在英国戴文康普頓时，他的父亲Osbert Thomas de Compton59岁，母亲Margaret Strathearn52岁。他于大约1275年与Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus在英国戴文康普頓 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1279年在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Compton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England (but especially in the southwest) named Compton, from Old English cumb ‘short, straight valley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cumpton
meanings: English (Herefordshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Compton  .

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Phillip de Compton III was born about 1258, in Compton, Devon, England, his father, Osbert Thomas de Compton, was 59 and his mother, Margaret Strathearn, was 52. He married Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus about 1275, in Compton Castle, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1279, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Phillip de Compton III est né environ 1258, à Compton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Osbert Thomas de Compton, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Margaret Strathearn, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus environ 1275, à Compton Castle, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1279, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Phillip de Compton III um 1258 in Compton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbert Thomas de Compton 59 und seine Mutter Margaret Strathearn 52. Er hat um 1275 in Compton Castle, Devon, England Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1279 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Warwick, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Phillip de Compton III è nato il circa 1258 nel Compton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Osbert Thomas de Compton, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Strathearn, aveva 52 anni. Lui sposato Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus circa 1275, nel Compton Castle, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1279, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Phillip de Compton IIIが約1258年にイギリスデボンコンプトンで生まれた時，父Osbert Thomas de Comptonは59歳，母Margaret Strathearnは52歳であった。約1275年にイギリスデボンコンプトン カストルでMariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1279年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで23歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Phillip de Compton III(이)가 대략 1258년 영국 데폰 콤프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbert Thomas de Compton(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Strathearn(은)는 52세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 영국 데폰 콤프턴 카스틀에서 Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1279년 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1258–circa 1279: tany ho any amin'ny 1258–tany ho any amin'ny 1279

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Phillip de Compton III nasceu aproximadamente 1258, em Compton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Osbert Thomas de Compton, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Strathearn, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus aproximadamente 1275, em Compton Castle, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1279, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Phillip de Compton III родился около 1258 г. в местности комптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Osbert Thomas de Compton было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Strathearn, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus около 1275 г. в местности комптон кастл, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1279 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 23 лет.

sm.about 1258–circa 1279: e tusa o le 1258–e tusa o le 1279

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Phillip de Compton III nació aproximadamente 1258, en Compton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Osbert Thomas de Compton, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Margaret Strathearn, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Mariat de Champernon, born Comlyn Countess of Agnus aproximadamente 1275, en Compton Castle, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1279, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años.
